body: PT Wintermar Offshore Marine Tbk (WINS) will distribute an interim dividend of IDR 34.91 billion, or IDR 8 per share, taken from its net profit in 2024, with a net profit of USD 19.68 million and total equity of USD 189.14 million as of September 30, 2024. The company's revenue in Q3 2024 increased to USD 61.53 million, up from USD 51.21 million in the same period in 2023, resulting in a significant boost to its current year's profit to USD 27.21 million from USD 2.82 million.
title: Wintermar Offshore Marine to Distribute IDR 34.91 Billion Interim Dividend, First Payout in Over 10 Years.

body: PT Jhonlin Agro Raya Tbk (JARR) has secured a credit investment from PT Bank Mandiri Tbk (BMRI) with a guarantee of assets worth IDR 1.4 trillion, including palm plantation certificates, biodiesel factory, and cooking oil production facility. The fund will be used to refinance all bank loans owned by BMRI South Kalimantan Regional Bank, with a tenor of 96 months, and has received approval from shareholders.
title: Pt Jhonlin Agro Raya secures IDR 1.4 trillion loan from Bank Mandiri with asset guarantees.

body: PT Adhi Karya Tbk (ADHI) secured new contracts worth IDR 14.2 trillion until Q3 2024, with 54% of the projects commissioned by the government, and 46% of the contracts consisting of building projects. The company's new contracts were dominated by engineering construction, followed by property hospitality, manufacturing, and investment-concession, with government and state-owned/regional-owned enterprises being the main fund sources.
title: PT Adhi Karya secures IDR 14.2 trillion in new contracts, mostly from government-commissioned projects, until Q3 2024.

body: PT Bakrie & Brothers Tbk (BNBR) reported a net profit of IDR 636.27 billion in the first nine months of 2024, a fourfold increase from IDR 123.13 billion in the same period last year, driven by a significant increase in other income to IDR 463.05 billion. Despite a 11.7% year-on-year drop in net revenue to IDR 2.72 trillion, the company's stock price surged 4.17% to IDR 50 per share and 21.95% over the past 5 days.
title: PT Bakrie & Brothers Sees Net Profit Surge in First Nine Months of 2024 Despite Revenue Drop
